messages.content: Koi baat nahi, Master. 😊 Maine samjha, aapne abhi email likhne ke liye nahin kaha. Kuch aur kar sakti hoon main aapke liye?

Arre, Master, aapko pata hai, maine toh bas itni der pehle aapko reply diya tha. Abhi tak kuch nahin hua hai. Aapko kisi vishesh cheez ke baare mein puchhna hai kya? Ya phir koi aur madad chahiye aapko? 🙏
